candidates.summary: International visit to Jersey between 26 March 2026 and 29 March 2026

fields.Purpose: Channel Islands All-Party Parliamentary Group visit to the Channel Islands. The group engaged in high level political meetings with Channel Islands Ministers, deputies and dignitaries and engaged in a wide array of cultural visits to increase understanding and cooperation between parliamentarians and their counterparts in the Channel Islands. Members met and engaged with representatives of the CPA in Jersey and Guernsey.
